description: Sale closed and onboarding confirmed. No follow-up needed.

messages.content: We've decided to go ahead! How do we get started?
Fantastic news, Lisa! I'll send the contract and onboarding guide to your email right now.
Got both, thanks! We'll review and sign today.
Perfect. Once signed, our onboarding team will reach out within 24 hours to set up your account. Welcome aboard!
Contract signed and sent back. Excited to get started!
